value_chain_position: Advanced packaging and wire-bonding capital equipment — makes ball-bonders, thermosonic bonders and flip-chip tools used in chip assembly including advanced package formats (TCB, hybrid bonding adjacency).
relative_comps: KLIC is the global #2 in wire bonding (behind ASM Pacific, unlisted) and is expanding into advanced packaging tools (TCB, mini-LED) that ride the AI packaging wave. However, 3-year CAGR is -24% (packaging cycle downturn) and near-zero FCF ($4M) limits reinvestment firepower. Relative to AMAT and LRCX which have dominant scale and deeper AI-packaging exposure, KLIC is a smaller, more cyclical bet. Its net-cash balance sheet is clean, but the growth profile looks more cyclical recovery than structural disruption ramp.
